titleStmt.title: SII 17.722: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 722. (A.R. No. 665 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.

The cyclic year Krōdhin cited in the inscription fell in Śaka 1346. The palaeography of the record would not militate against this. The details of date, viz., Krōdhin, Aṟpaśi 2 may correspond to 1424 A.D. September 30, in which case the king may be identified with Dēvarāya II.

This inscription records the gift of 4000 kuḻi of land by Oṟṟi Maṉṉaṉ alias Uḍaiyār Oṟṟi-Araśar and Araśuperumāḷ alias Kāḍavarāya for conducting certain special festivals in the Kāḍavarāyar tiruttōppu (sacred grove) and at the Aśaṅgādagaṇḍaṉ-maṇḍapa in the temple of Tirumullaivāyal-uḍaiya-nāyanār. The land was given away with irrigation facilities from the donor's lake (periyēri).
Also mentions the measuring rod Aśaṅgāḍagaṇḍaṉ-kōl.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Irāyar pratāpadevarāyaṟkkuc cellāniṉṟa krodhi varuṣam Aṟpci mātam Iraṇṭāntiyati
Uṭaiyār tirumullaivāyal Uṭaiya nāyiṉār tirunāḷ Upayattukkum Acaṅkāta kaṇṭaṉ maṇṭa pattil ciṟappukkum
kāṭavarāyar tiruttoppil Āna tirunāḷc ciṟappukkum Oṟṟimaṉṉarāṉa Uṭaiyār Oṟṟi Aracarum Aracu perumāḷ Āṉa
kāṭavarāyarum Inta Upayattukku Eṅkaḷ kāṇi Āṭci Āṉa veḷḷāṉ Ūril kiḻaik kaḻaniyil māṉkuḻikku teṟkku
kaḷaṅkuḻikku vaṭakku muṉṉāḷ Uṭaiyavaṟku viṭṭa viḷakkuppaṭṭikku meṟkku Acaṅkātakaṇṭaṉ Aḷavu kolā
l viṭṭa kuḻi 4 1000 Ikkuḻi nālāyiramum kaikkoṇṭu Inta Upayam Iraṇṭum cantirātitta varaiyum naṭattak kaṭa
vatākavum Ippaṭikku tirukkoyilile tirukkaṭṭaḷaiyile cilālekaiyum paṇṇi Iṉṉilat tiṟ tiruccūlattāpanamum paṇṇi
kkuṭuttom Iṉṉilattukku Eṅkaḷ periyeri perunirum Āṟu nirum pāyakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭikku cantiṟātittavaraiyum naṭakkak ka
ṭavatāka kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom Oṟṟi Aracar kāṭavarāyarom Ippaṭikku Ivai Oṟṟi Aracar Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku Ivai kaāṭavarāyar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.722 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
